title.ko: 전송

definition.ko: 세부 H04B1/00 전달에 이용되는 매체에 따라 특징지어지는시스템 도체를 이용하는 것 H04B3/00 자유공간의 전파를 이용하는 것 H04B5/00 ~ H04B11/00 그 외의 것들 H04B13/00 전송매체에 의하여 특징지어지지 않는 시스템 H04B14/00 잡음 또는 혼신의 억제 및 제한 H04B15/00 감시, 시험 H04B17/00

title.ko: 그룹 H04B3/00 ~ H04B13/00의 단일 그룹에 포함되지 않는 전송시스템의 세부; 전송에 사용되는 매체에 특징이 없는 전송 시스템의 세부
title.en: Details of transmission systems, not covered by a single one of groups H04B0003000000-H04B0013000000; Details of transmission systems not characterised by the medium used for transmission

title.ko: 수신기

title.en: Means associated with receiver for limiting or suppressing noise or interference

title.ko: 회로
입력 회로, 예. 안테나 또는 전송선의 결합을 위한것 (증폭기를 위한 입력 회로 일반 H03F; 수신기의 특성에 독립적인 수신기와 안테나 또는 라인 사이의 결합 네트워크 H03H)
title.en: Input circuits, e.g. for coupling to an antenna or a transmission line  (coupling networks between antennas or lines and receivers independent of the nature of the receiver H03H)
for coupling gramophone pick-up, recorder output, or microphone to receiver
for receivers in which no local oscillation is generated
the receiver comprising at least one semiconductor device having three or more electrodes

title.ko: 슈퍼헤테로다인 수신기용(다중주파수 변환 H03D 7/16)

title.en: the receiver comprising at least one semiconductor device having three or more electrodes

title.ko: 호모다인 또는 싱크로다인 수신기를 위한 것 (복조기 회로 H03D1/22)
title.en: for homodyne or synchrodyne receivers (demodulator circuits H03D0001220000)

title.ko: 송수신기(transceiver), 즉 송신기와 수신기가 하나의 구조유닛를 형성하며 또한 적어도 일부분은 송신과 수신기능용으로 사용되는 장치
title.en: Transceivers, i.e. devices in which transmitter and receiver form a structural unit and in which at least one part is used for functions of transmitting and receiving
Mechanical arrangements for accommodating identification devices, e.g. cards or chips; with connectors for programming identification devices
Arrangements for facilitating insertion or removal of identification devices

title.ko: 차량 내에서의 사용에 특히 적합한 것 (H04B 1/3827이 우선)
title.en: specially adapted for use in vehicles (H04B0001382700 takes precedence)
Arrangements for enabling portable transceivers to be used in a fixed position, e.g. cradles or boosters
Arrangements for mounting batteries or battery chargers
Arrangements for carrying or protecting transceivers

title.ko: 회로

title.en: for selecting or indicating operating mode
using the same oscillator for generating both the transmitter frequency and the receiver local oscillator frequency
the transmitter oscillator frequency being identical to the receiver local oscillator frequency
by voice-frequency signals; by pilot signals
in circuits for connecting transmitter and receiver to a common transmission path, e.g. by energy of transmitter
using different frequencies for the two directions of communication
Hybrid arrangements, i.e. arrangements for transition from single-path two-direction transmission to single-direction transmission on each of two paths or vice versa
with means for reducing leakage of transmitter signal into the receiver

title.ko: 양방향 통신을 위한 동일 주파수를 사용하는 것 ( H04B 1/44 이 우선 )
title.en: using the same frequency for two directions of communication (H04B0001440000 takes precedence)
with provision for simultaneous communication in two directions
Hybrid arrangements, i.e. arrangements for transition from single-path two-direction transmission to single-direction transmission on each of two paths or vice versa
for providing a predistortion of the signal in the transmitter and corresponding correction in the receiver, e.g. for improving the signal/noise ratio

title.ko: 신호의 대역폭을 감소시키기 위한 것; 전송의 효율을 개선하기 위한 것(1/68 우선)
title.en: for reducing bandwidth of signals; for improving efficiency of transmission (H04B0001680000 takes precedence)
for wholly or partially suppressing the carrier or one side band
Hybrid techniques using combinations of two or more spread spectrum techniques
Multi-step acquisition, e.g. multi-dwell, coarse-fine or validation
Cell search, e.g. using a three-step approach
using a code tracking loop, e.g. a delay-locked loop
the interference being multiple access interference
Joint detection techniques, e.g. linear detectors
Constructive combining of multi-path signals, i.e. RAKE receivers
Selection, re-selection, allocation or re-allocation of paths to fingers, e.g. timing offset control of allocated fingers
Weighting of fingers for combining, e.g. amplitude control or phase rotation using an inner loop
Arrangements for generation of hop frequencies, e.g. using a bank of frequency sources, using continuous tuning or using a transform
Arrangements for generation of hop patterns
Circuits or components for simulating antennas, e.g. dummy antennas
for increasing reliability, e.g. using redundant or spare channels or apparatus
Pilot transmitters or receivers for control of transmission or for equalising

title.ko: 유선 전송시스템(근접전자계 전송시스템과 결합한 것 H04B 5/00)
title.en: Line transmission systems (combined with near-field transmission systems H04B0005000000)

title.ko: 세부
하이브리드회로(송수신기를 위한 것 H04B 1/52, H04B 1/58)
전송의 제어; 등화

title.en: in negative-feedback path of line amplifier

title.ko: 파이롯트신호에 의한 것
파이롯트 와이어(pilot wire)(3/12가 우선)

title.en: in negative-feedback path of line amplifier
characterised by the equalising network used
characterised by the negative-impedance network used
wherein the network comprises semiconductor devices
Reducing echo effects or singing; Opening or closing transmitting path; Conditioning for transmission in one direction or the other
using a replica of transmitted signal in the time domain, e.g. echo cancellers
Improving frequency characteristic by the use of loading coils
Reducing interference caused by currents induced in cable sheathing or armouring
Reducing interference caused by unbalanced currents in a normally balanced line
by systematic interconnection of lengths of cable during laying; by addition of balancing components to cable during laying

title.ko: 중계기회로(H04B 3/58 우선)

title.en: for signals in two different frequency ranges transmitted in opposite directions over the same transmission path
Artificial lines; Networks simulating a line of certain length
Circuits for by-passing of ringing signals
Arrangements for feeding power to a repeater along the transmission line

title.ko: 모니터링; 테스팅

title.en: Testing group delay or phase shift, e.g. timing jitter
Testing attenuation in combination with at least one of group delay and phase shift

title.ko: 감쇠에 대한 시험
2도체전송선을 경유하는 고정국간의 전송시스템 (H04B 3/54가 우선)
title.en: Systems for transmission between fixed stations via two-conductor transmission lines (H04B0003540000 takes precedence)
Systems for transmission between fixed stations via waveguides

title.ko: 배전선(power distribution line)을 경유하는 전송을 위한 시스템(경보 신호 시스템 G08B 25/06)
title.en: Systems for transmission via power distribution lines (in alarm signalling systems G08B0025060000)
Circuits for coupling, blocking, or by-passing of signals

title.ko: 상대적으로 이동가능한 국간의 통신용 시스템, 예. 리프트(lift)와 통신하는 것(3/54가 우선)
title.en: Systems for communication between relatively movable stations, e.g. for communication with lift (H04B0003540000 takes precedence)
Near-field transmission systems, e.g. inductive or capacitive transmission systems
characterised by the transmission technique; characterised by the transmission medium
using the near field of leaky cables, e.g. of leaky coaxial cables
characterised by components specially adapted for near-field transmission
for taking measurements, e.g. using sensing coils
for data transfer in combination with power transfer

title.ko: 무선전송시스템, 즉, 방사전자계를 이용한 것(H04B 10/00, H04B 15/00이 우선)
title.en: Radio transmission systems, i.e. using radiation field (H04B0010000000, H04B0015000000 take precedence)

title.ko: 다이버시티(diversity) 시스템; 다중 안테나 시스템, 즉. 다중 안테나를 이용한 송신 또는 수신 ( RAKE 수신기 H04B 1/7115 )
title.en: Diversity systems; Multi-antenna systems, i.e. transmission or reception using multiple antennas  (RAKE receivers H04B0001711500)

title.ko: 사이트 다이버시티; 매크로 시티( (둘 또는 그 이상의 독립된 안테나를 사용하는 것 H04B 7/04)
title.en: Site diversity; Macro-diversity  (using two or more spaced independent antennas H04B0007040000)
Co-operative use of antennas at several sites, e.g. in co-ordinated multipoint or co-operative multiple-input multiple-output [MIMO] systems
Co-operative diversity, e.g. using fixed or mobile stations as relays
using two or more spaced independent antennas
the mobile station comprising multiple antennas, e.g. to provide uplink diversity
using two or more beams, i.e. beam diversity
Selection of precoding matrices or codebooks, e.g. using matrices for antenna weighting
using two or more sectors, i.e. sector diversity
using overlapping sectors in the same base station to implement MIMO antennas

title.ko: 중계(relay) 시스템
능동 중계 시스템
기지국 (Ground-based stations)(H04B 7/204가 우선)

title.en: employing pulse modulation, e.g. pulse code modulation

title.ko: 우주국 또는 항공기탑재국 (Space-based or airborne stations)(H04B 7/204가 우선)
title.en: Space-based or airborne stations (H04B0007204000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 둘 또는 그 이상의 지점간의 통신을 위한 것 (무선통신네트워크 H04W)
title.en: for communication between two or more posts (wireless communication networks H04W)
at least one of which is mobile

title.ko: 무선파와는 다른 전자기파를 사용하는 전송 시스템, 예. 적외선, 가시 또는 자외선 광, 또는 전자미립자방사(corpuscular radiation)를 사용하는 것, 예. 양자 통신
title.en: Transmission systems employing electromagnetic waves other than radio-waves, e.g. infrared, visible or ultraviolet light, or employing corpuscular radiation, e.g. quantum communication

definition.ko: 이 그룹에서는, 비광학적 전송 시스템은 그룹 H04B 10/90으로 분류된다.

title.ko: 전송시스템을 모니터링 또는 테스트를 위한 조치; 전송 시스템의 결함 측정을 위한 조치
title.en: Arrangements for monitoring or testing transmission systems; Arrangements for fault measurement of transmission systems
using a reflected signal, e.g. using optical time domain reflectometers [OTDR]

title.ko: 고장 신호를 이용하는 것(H04B 10/071 우선)
title.en: using an out-of-service signal (H04B0010071000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 가동중인 신호를 이용하는 것(H04B 10/071 우선)
title.en: using an in-service signal (H04B0010071000 takes precedence)
using a supervisory or additional signal
using measurements of the data signal
Arrangements specific to free-space transmission, i.e. transmission through air or vacuum
Line-of-sight transmission over an extended range
for the reduction or elimination of distortion or dispersion
due to scattering processes, e.g. Raman or Brillouin scattering
due to fibre non-linearities, e.g. Kerr effect
Radio-over-fibre, e.g. radio frequency signal modulated onto an optical carrier
using a single light source for multiple stations
in which processing or amplification is carried out without conversion of the main signal from optical form
in a multiwavelength system, e.g. gain equalisation
Transient power control, e.g. due to channel add/drop or rapid fluctuations in the input power
Signal waveform processing, e.g. reshaping or retiming
using a single component as both light source and receiver, e.g. using a photoemitter as a photoreceiver
Pulse generation, e.g. generation of solitons
Digital modulation, e.g. differential phase shift keying [DPSK] or frequency shift keying [FSK]
Non-coherent receivers, e.g. using direct detection

title.ko: 그룹 H04B 10/03에서 H04B 10/70에서 제공하지 않는 특정 응용을 위한 광 전송의 사용에 관한 광학 특성, 예. 광전력 수유 또는 물을 통한 광의 전송
title.en: Optical aspects relating to the use of optical transmission for specific applications, not provided for in groups H04B0010030000-H04B0010700000, e.g. optical power feeding or optical transmission through water
Protection from unauthorised access, e.g. eavesdrop protection
Non-optical transmission systems, e.g. transmission systems employing non-photonic corpuscular radiation
Transmission systems employing ultrasonic, sonic or infrasonic waves

title.ko: 전송매체에 의하여 특징지어지는 전송시스템이고 그룹 3/00에서 11/00까지에 분류되지 않는 것
title.en: Transmission systems characterised by the medium used for transmission, not provided for in groups H04B0003000000-H04B0011000000
Transmission systems in which the medium consists of the earth or a large mass of water thereon, e.g. earth telegraphy

title.ko: 전송매체에 의하여 특징지어지지 않는 전송방식 (H04B 1/00의 세부내용)
title.en: Transmission systems not characterised by the medium used for transmission (details thereof H04B0001000000)

title.ko: 펄스변조의 사용에 의하여 특징 지워 지는 것 (라디오 전송릴레이 H04B 7/17)
title.en: characterised by the use of pulse modulation (in radio transmission relays H04B0007170000)
using differential modulation, e.g. delta modulation
characterised by the use of a sub-carrier

title.ko: 잡음 또는 혼신의 억압 또는 제한(수신기와 결합한 수단에 의한 것 H04B 1/10)
title.en: Suppression or limitation of noise or interference (by means associated with receiver H04B0001100000)
Reducing interference from electric apparatus by means located at or near the interfering apparatus
the interference being caused by substantially sinusoidal oscillations, e.g. in a receiver or in a tape-recorder

title.ko: 모니터링; 테스트 (라인 전송계통에 대한 것 H04B 3/46; 라디오 파장 이외의 전자파를 이용하는 전송 시스템을 모니터링하거나 테스트하기위한 장치 H04B 10/07)
title.en: Monitoring; Testing (of line transmission systems H04B0003460000;arrangements for monitoring or testing transmission systems employing electromagnetic waves other than radio waves H04B0010070000)

title.ko: 송신기에 대한 것

title.en: of transmit antennas, e.g. of amplitude or phase
of power amplifiers, e.g. of gain or non-linearity
of the whole transmission and reception path, e.g. self-test loop-back

title.ko: 수행 테스트

title.en: Test equipment located at the transmitter

title.ko: …불이행 또는 불완전이행의 감지, 예. 반응편차 (H04B 17/18이 우선)
title.en: Detection of non-compliance or faulty performance, e.g. response deviations (H04B0017180000 takes precedence)
Indication means, e.g. displays, alarms or audible means
with feedback of measurements to the transmitter
using historical data, averaging values or statistics
for locating or positioning the transmitter

title.ko: 전파채널에 대한 것
채널 품질변수를 측정하거나 평가하는 것
title.en: Measuring or estimating channel quality parameters

title.ko: …간섭값 (H04B 17/336이 우선)

title.en: for resource allocation, admission control or handover
